item.name: Identity

description.content: APIs for managing identities and access tokens.

item.name: List Identities

description.content: List identities created by your account.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Create an Identity

description.content: Create an identity. This identity will be used to authenticate with the Git server.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Delete an Identity

description.content: Delete an identity. This will revoke all permissions granted to this identity.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: List Repository Permissions for an Identity

request.name: List Repository Permissions for an Identity

description.content: List repository permissions for an identity. This will return a list of repositories that the identity has access to.

query.description: Maximum number of repositories to return
Offset for the list of repositories

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Get the Git Permission of an Identity on a Repository

request.name: Get the Git Permission of an Identity on a Repository

description.content: Get the permission of an identity on a repository. This will return the access level of the identity on the repository.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Update a Git Repository Permission for an Identity

request.name: Update a Git Repository Permission for an Identity

description.content: Update a permission for an identity on a repository
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Grant a Git Repository Permission to an Identity

request.name: Grant a Git Repository Permission to an Identity

description.content: Grant a permission to an identity on a repository
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Revoke Git Repository Permission From an Identity

request.name: Revoke Git Repository Permission From an Identity

description.content: Revoke a permission to an identity on a repository
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: List VM Permissions for an Identity

request.name: List VM Permissions for an Identity

description.content: List all VM permissions granted to a specific Git identity
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Get VM Permission Details

description.content: Get the details of a VM permission for a specific identity and VM
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Update Allowed Users for VM Permission

request.name: Update Allowed Users for VM Permission

description.content: Update the list of allowed users for a VM permission. Set to null to allow all users, or provide a list to restrict access.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Grant VM Permission to an Identity for a VM

request.name: Grant VM Permission to an Identity for a VM

description.content: Grant VM access permission to an identity for a specific VM. Optionally restrict access to specific Linux users.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Revoke VM Permission From an Identity for a VM

request.name: Revoke VM Permission From an Identity for a VM

description.content: Revoke VM permission from an identity for a specific VM
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: List Access Tokens for an Identity

request.name: List Access Tokens for an Identity

description.content: List access tokens for an identity
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Create an Access Token for an Identity

request.name: Create an Access Token for an Identity

description.content: Create an access token for an identity
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Revoke an Access Token for an Identity

request.name: Revoke an Access Token for an Identity

description.content: Revoke an access token for an identity
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Auth
Get Background Request Result

description.content: Replay the stored response for a backgrounded request when it finishes.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Background request not found or expired

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Get Current User

description.content: Returns information about the currently authenticated user or identity.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Identity and access management for end users and agents — identities, access tokens, repository permissions, VM permissions, and bearer-token whoami/background-request lookup.
